project.name: ai-cos-cc-adk

last_session.summary: claude-ai-sync v7.2.0 — aligned with source-of-truth (17 tools, SyncAgent live, 7 Postgres tables). Resolved 14 conflicts between CLAUDE.md/CONTEXT.md and source-of-truth docs.

next_session_priorities: Complete CC-CAI sync pilot (validate format, push to GitHub)

pending_inbox.content: Web & Frontend Skills Portfolio shipped in CC (all 6 phases). Cloud deployment NOT done. Handoff guide at Skills Factory: Web & Browsers/web-tools-mcp-handoff.md. Blockers: (1) Droplet RAM upgrade 1GB to 4GB, (2) Install Chrome+Playwright on droplet, (3) Build web-tools MCP as separate service (fault isolation from ai-cos-mcp), (4) Expose via Cloudflare Tunnel at web.3niac.com/mcp, (5) Deploy cookie-sync.sh to cron + rsync to droplet, (6) Connect CAI to web-tools MCP as remote connector.

architecture.summary: Local CC project with MCP server on droplet. ContentAgent (5-min cron) + SyncAgent (10-min cron) live. 17 MCP tools via FastMCP Python. Postgres (7 tables) + Notion (8 DBs) dual-write. Cloudflare Tunnel for public endpoint. digest.wiki via Vercel.
key_patterns: Content pipeline: extraction > analysis > digest > publish
Build traces: rolling window + compaction every 3 iterations
